title: Evaluation
description: MEAI evaluators score agent responses for coherence, relevance, and quality.

steps.content: Explain how to add middleware to the chat client pipeline.
steps.annotation: The user asks a technical question that the agent answers.

steps.content: Use AddChatClient on the service collection to register middleware. Each DelegatingChatClient wraps the next in the pipeline. The order of registration determines execution order.
steps.annotation: The agent provides a response that should be evaluated for quality.

steps.content: evaluate(question, answer) -> run evaluators in parallel
steps.annotation: The evaluation pipeline kicks in after the response is generated.

steps.content: CoherenceEvaluator: score 0.92 (response is logically consistent, no contradictions)
steps.annotation: The coherence evaluator checks that the response is internally consistent.

steps.content: RelevanceEvaluator: score 0.88 (response directly addresses the question)
steps.annotation: The relevance evaluator checks that the response stays on topic.
The composite evaluator combines individual scores into a final quality rating.

steps.content: evaluation_result: { coherence: 0.92, relevance: 0.88, composite: 0.90, pass: true }
steps.annotation: The evaluation result is recorded for observability and quality tracking.
